description.value:
You outstretch your hand, and the Wisdom Seal engraved into you at birth briefly arises, manifesting as a Huge effigy in an unoccupied space within 120 feet. This seal cannot be placed within 20 feet of any creature.

All hostile creatures that start their turn or enter within 60 feet of the seal must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, the target takes 3d8 force damage, is grappled, and is unable to make hand signs while they remain within 60 feet of the seal. They are also pulled 10 feet closer to the seal. On a success, the target instead takes half as much damage and treats the area as difficult terrain. Affected creatures repeat this saving throw at the start of each of their turns while within 60 feet of the seal.

If an affected target's movement would push them inside the seal's space, they must immediately make a Charisma saving throw. On a failure, they are pulled into the seal's space and become trapped, becoming Incapacitated for the duration and automatically failing this jutsu's Dexterity saving throw. Targets trapped inside the seal remake the Charisma saving throw at the end of each of their turns, being ejected 30 feet away from the seal on a success.

Creatures outside of the seal can attempt to destroy it by attacking. The seal has 10d10 hit points and an AC equal to your Ninjutsu save DC. If destroyed, this jutsu ends early.

The amount of space the seal takes up determines the maximum number of creatures that may be trapped inside it. When at least one creature is trapped, you may use an action to collapse the seal, causing it to implode and explode simultaneously. Each creature inside the seal must make a Strength saving throw at disadvantage, taking 7d10 force damage on a failure, ignoring Damage Reduction (DR) and Temporary Hit Points (THP), or half as much on a success. This jutsu then ends.
